flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-1929: 'Court order says paycheck' | ROW-1936: 'I'll be reaching out to my lawyer tomorrow since you don't have any other solution' | ROW-2171: '...about to go to jail for no payment. Who's making smart choices there' | ROW-2181: 'You're gonna need it to pay my attorney fees'
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Multiple RF-05 signal elements across a 26-day span: SIGNAL 1 — ROW-1929/1936 (Mar 5): Court-order citation ('Court order says paycheck') plus lawyer consultation threat ('I'll be reaching out to my lawyer tomorrow since you don't have any other solution'). Third instance of lawyer/contempt financial-enforcement pattern. ADD-002: Sev-1 (recurring, paper tiger trajectory). SIGNAL 2 — ROW-2171 (Mar 31): 'about to go to jail for no payment' — embedded within the Abby/niece-attack cluster; jail-consequence framing adds implied imprisonment threat for non-payment. First instance of imprisonment-framing in the financial threat category. ADD-002: Sev-1 (extreme but embedded in broader attack; no follow-through on financial threats to date). SIGNAL 3 — ROW-2181 (Mar 31): 'You're gonna need it to pay my attorney fees' — first explicit attorney-fees threat. Delivered in the same escalation cluster as the niece attack. ADD-002 first-instance rule: attorney-fees category = new threat type, but delivered in banter context (Eli had been making sarcastic AI-assisted responses, ROW-2167-2180). Given banter context, severity is Sev-1 rather than Sev-2. Taken together: Mar 5 and Mar 31 signals span two episodes and continue the established compliance-pressure pattern. Both are Sev-1 repeats. No new threat category rises to Sev-2.

peripheral_flags.note: ROW-1884-1885: 'I shouldn't have called you a dumbass in front of her but you're such a shit dad that it slipped out' — RF04-ADD-002 contempt pattern; DARVO partial (contempt as Eli's fault). RF-04 primary.

ROW-2168: 'Who's the dumbass that's fucking his niece? A girl he met when she was 7' — third predation framing (COMP-RF04-006 per RF-04 pass). RF-04+RF-15 primary per ADD-001. RF-05 peripheral aggressive-tone only.

flagged_messages.context_notes: ROW-2171 ('about to go to jail') is embedded in the Abby-niece attack cluster (ROW-2168-2191) — the predation attack, jail threat, and attorney fees threat all appear in rapid succession on Mar 31. Context: a prolonged sarcastic exchange where Eli was responding with AI-generated comebacks (ROW-2167-2180). The legal threats in this cluster appear to be intensified by the tone of the exchange. ROW-2182 (Eli, Sent) shifts to a sincere explanatory message about the car accident affecting his finances — suggesting the threats landed and produced a compliance/explanation response.
flagged_messages.quote_excerpt: 'You're gonna need it to pay my attorney fees' (ROW-2181); 'I'll be reaching out to my lawyer tomorrow' (ROW-1936)

batch_observations.tone_assessment: B-006 (Feb-Apr 2023) adds three more RF-05 signal elements across two episodes. The jail-consequence framing (ROW-2171) is new language — the most severe financial threat formulation to date. The attorney-fees threat (ROW-2181) is the first of that sub-category. Neither rises to Sev-2 given the recurring pattern and banter context. ARC-RF05-001 remains active and growing.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 B-006: COMP-RF04-006 = third predation framing (ROW-2167/2173). RF-05 attorney-fees threat (ROW-2181) is embedded in the same compound cluster. RF-04 primary.
